result.text: Contact: a single-rider craft, open cockpit, maximum wind exposure. Pilot's jacket classification: {pick:vintage|weathered|aspirational}. Scan the pilot's playlist, or their heading?

moveon.text: The vessel drifts out of optimal range. Its secrets remain its own. For now.

playlist.text: Playlist intercepted: {pick:70s road anthems|surprisingly, a podcast about beekeeping|one song, on loop, for 200 miles}. Do we judge, or salute?

salute.text: Salute transmitted via respectful nod protocol. The rider nodded back. Two vessels, one understanding. This is the way of the road.

judged.text: Judgment logged, gently. The rider is beyond our judgment anyway — anyone that committed to one song has achieved a kind of enlightenment.

heading.text: Heading analysis: {pick:nowhere in particular, gloriously|the horizon, generally|a diner known only to riders}. Some vessels navigate by feel. Respect.
